title: Concurrent owner wishlist saves lose one newly created item
stepsToReproduce: Read the same wishlist baseline in both sessions
Submit two PUT /api/account/wishlist requests at the same time, each adding a different item
actualBehavior: Final wishlist had race item A=false, race item B=true; one save appears to have overwritten the other.
